title: Letter XLII.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: (This letter, urging his friend to attend at Cæsarea for the election of a Metropolitan in succession to Eusebius, has been already given in the second division of this Selection.)
